en: My next tip is to make your to-do list in English.
ko: 다음 팁은 할 일 목록을 영어로 만드는 거예요.

en: A shopping list or a work list?
Both.
For example, for Maria's wedding, I have a list,
ko: 예를 들어, Maria 결혼식을 위해 목록이 있어요.

en: buy flowers, call Maria, practice dancing.
ko: 꽃 사기, Maria에게 전화하기, 춤 연습하기.

en: Practice dancing?
Are you a good dancer, Emily?
I am.
Okay.
But the list helps me think in English
ko: 하지만 이 목록이 영어로 생각하는 데 도움이 돼요.

en: because I see the words every time I look at my paper.
That is good.
I do that with my shopping list.
Milk, eggs, apples, cookies.
Especially the cookies for Tom and Sarah.
Yes.
When I see the word milk on my list,
I don't think of the word in my language.
I just think of the white drink.
Exactly.
It's about making English a part of your daily routine.
